testsuite.name: org.example.compiler.MiniKotlinCompilerTest

testcase.name: compile example_mini outputs 120 and 15()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Expected value to be of type <org.example.compiler.CompilationResult$Success (Kotlin reflection is not available)>, actual <class org.example.compiler.CompilationResult$Failure (Kotlin reflection is not available)>.
